summary.key_theme: 儘管公司營收與財報表現強勁且受惠於 AI 電力需求，但近期股價因分析師目標價下調及機構持倉變動出現顯著波動。

bullish.title: The AI Power Bottleneck Makes Constellation Energy A Strong Buy
bullish.reason: 強調公司在 AI 電力瓶頸中的關鍵地位，並列舉 Calpine 交易與核能重啟計畫作為長期成長動能。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Posts a 64% Revenue Jump and Raises Its Full-Year Outlook
bullish.reason: 營收大幅成長 64 % 並上調全年財測，顯示公司核心業務動能強勁。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy’s $13 Billion Cash Flow Outlook Shows AI’s Power Trade Is Just Beginning
bullish.reason: 指出 130 億美元的現金流展望，凸顯公司作為 AI 基礎設施電力供應商的財務優勢。

bullish.title: Constellation and Pine Creek RNG Announce Equity Purchase Agreement in RNG Facilities
bullish.reason: 透過與 Pine Creek RNG 的股權收購協議，進一步擴大在再生天然氣領域的布局。

bearish.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Is Down 12.6% After EPS Surges And Buyback Completion – Has The Bull Case Changed?
bearish.reason: 股價在財報後出現 12.6 % 的顯著回調，引發市場對多頭邏輯是否改變的擔憂。

bearish.title: Why Constellation Energy Stock Slumped by More Than 6% Today
bearish.reason: 因分析師下調目標價導致股價單日下跌超過 6 %，反映市場對估值的修正壓力。

bearish.title: Third Point Sells Position In Alibaba Group; ...; Constellation Energy; ...
bearish.reason: 知名對沖基金 Third Point 在 13 F 申報中揭露減持 Constellation Energy，可能對市場信心造成負面影響。

bearish.title: Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) Shareholders Should Be Cautious Despite Solid Earnings
bearish.reason: 儘管財報表現穩健，但市場情緒轉趨謹慎，提醒投資人注意潛在的獲利了結賣壓。

neutral.title: Jim Cramer on Constellation Energy: “The Earnings Have Been Fine, It’s the Zeitgeist That Matters There”
neutral.reason: Jim Cramer 認為財報本身表現正常，股價波動更多受市場情緒與趨勢影響，未給出明確買賣建議。

neutral.title: Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為 Zacks.com 用戶關注度報告，屬於常規市場熱度分析，無實質利多或利空影響。

neutral.title: Final Trade: CEG, GLD, NDAQ, CLF — The final trades of the day with CNBC's Melissa Lee and the 'Fast Money' traders.
neutral.reason: 節目中的短線交易討論，未提供深入的基本面分析。
